## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated (unit + integration as relevant).
- [ ] `mypy src` green.
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` green.
- [ ] `docs/changelog.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]` if the change is user-visible.
- [ ] `docs/api_reference.md` updated if the public surface changed.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal paths in the diff.
- [ ] Breaking changes (if any) are flagged in the PR description with a clear migration note.
